title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Vascon Engineers

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Vascon Engineers
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!
